title: Ribeirão Preto、SP — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Ribeirão Preto、SPの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Ribeirão PretoはSPにある人口720,116の都市です。A wealthy agribusiness hub in São Paulo’s interior, known for its chope (draft beer) culture, medical centers, and high quality of life.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
